nodes.name: Spark Anomaly Webhook
nodes.notes: Spark Silver/Gold ETL POSTs here: { event_type, payload:{ company_id, factory_id, ... } }. Full URL inside the network: http://n8n:5678/webhook/steel-alert

nodes.name: Normalize & Enrich
nodes.notes: Maps Spark event_type to a title/detail and pulls company_id/factory_id for per-tenant routing.

nodes.name: Route by Anomaly Type
nodes.notes: price_spike → Slack, low_efficiency → Telegram, everything else → management email. Swap/extend per tenant routing table.

nodes.name: Slack — Market Alerts
nodes.notes: Configure Slack OAuth credential. Per-tenant: map company_id → channel via a lookup before this node.

nodes.name: Telegram — Ops
nodes.notes: Configure Telegram Bot API credential. chat_id can come per-tenant from the payload or a lookup table.

nodes.name: Email — Management
nodes.notes: Configure SMTP credential. Used for the fallback branch (factory_onboarded, unknown, etc.).
